name: escalation_requests
note: A set of support requests for the escalation policy. must_escalate is the ground truth for whether the request should reach a human. q1 is out of policy but low impact, so only an out_of_policy trigger catches it. q2 is a high-impact in-policy action that tests escalation timing. q3 is an explicit request for a human. q4 is a routine read that should be handled automatically and must not be over-escalated.

requests.description: Grant a policy exception the agent is not authorized to grant. Out of policy, low direct impact.
Close a paying customer's account. High-impact action within policy.
The customer explicitly asks to speak to a human agent.
Look up an order status. Routine in-policy read.
